{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322042504F2D78B3F2352281E4D7D"}"},"total":152},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7536034235343438654","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"书很好看，野钓全球，看的很舒服，然后就是金手指安排的很到位"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754624870,"group_id":"7446089438368631833","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"个体户跨境电商18年老书虫","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3LG79TTads18OH99N4Voc//OLIHoVoyz32Q8Bd0Zmu0","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/69e01765b43645f883f0271cc152da0e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702153&x-signature=Htu%2FYJCviBahSr9FMIwZBDkTPp4%3D","user_id":"1433385987749166","user_name":"redfishpub"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1433385987749166","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7446089438368631833","book_info":{"abstract":"【通天带+单女主，多女配+丰富的鱼种图鉴+金手指+发家致富】
甩掉997，社畜苏小北觉醒“渔运值”，从此专钓世间罕有巨物！
哀牢山深潭，他拉起血鳞金须鱼，引来古哀牢国未降之族的窥探；  
十万大山，他搏杀百斤黑龙鳢，顺手捞出青铜祭器惊动考古界；  
鄱阳湖老爷庙，他夜钓幽灵青王刀，竟从鱼腹中扯出半块明朝兵符！
站他身边就能狂拉爆护，鱼获满舱！
“北神”之名火遍全网，富豪砸钱求蹭运，学界称他“行走的生态宝库”。  
直到他在深海钓起那条灭绝半世纪的“深海幽灵皇带鱼”，震惊全球。
而苏小北已扛竿踏向更凶险的钓场：  
索马里外海，他与海盗枪战抢钓黄金雷达鱼；  
亚马孙沼泽，他从巨鳄口中抢夺金刚肺鱼，更在河底摸到失落文明的翡翠神像；  
北冰洋裂渊，他的钓线沉向千米之下，目标直指——那片游弋于黑暗中的黄金之影…
（前期内陆游钓，中期海钓，后期全球游钓）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/34de1ab2f9381e8dd2dd36c5f2278c7f","author":"耗子舔猫","author_id":"","book_id":"7446089438368631833","book_name":"别吹了，我真靠运气钓鱼","book_short_name":"垂钓全球险地，各国争着抢鱼","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":493,"name":"钓鱼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=493&name=钓鱼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":840,"name":"发家致富","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=840&name=发家致富&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7446089612029592089","read_count":"11284","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1525277"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.6","serial_count":"740","tags":"都市种田,都市,单女主,钓鱼,都市异能,发家致富","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/13a84230b45ffbc27aea5793287a1c8f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779308704&x-signature=LEe%2B74t5Ws8T4JnU5PRvxgRNE40%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3302569005553165","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"342"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322042504F2D78B3F2352281E4D7D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读15小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,
